name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Out of Touch Tom is WRONG for Agriculture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
| | | Out of Touch Tom is at it again! Join me in the fight to bring real representation to rural Arizona. Friend, **Out of Touch Tom is at it again!** This morning, Congressman O’Halleran joined Nancy Pelosi in voting against the Farm Bill, a bill that would greatly benefit a district facing catastrophic forest fires, loss of agricultural industries, and record water shortages. Time after time, rural Arizona has been forgotten by politicians whose job is to advocate for us. When Congressman Tom O’Halleran voted no on the 2018 Farm Bill he put a knife through the heart of the district. The Farm Bill includes investments in rural broadband infrastructure, expands affordable healthcare coverage, and gives rural communities more tools to combat opioid abuse. It invests in locally-led conservation programs and directs the US Forest Service to tackle forest health and wildfire prevention. The farm bill maintains and strengthens the nation’s nutrition programs to assist those who struggle to put food on the table while providing critical training to help people learn the skills necessary to gain well-paying jobs, financial self-sufficiency, and better futures for themselves and their families. The U.S. Chamber came out supporting the bill due to the “meaningful work/job training requirements for able-bodied adults.” **This is why we must get Congressman O’Halleran out of office!** District 1 deserves a representative who has the back of rural Arizona. I will be that Congresswoman! But I need your help to get there. Leftist Super PACs have already invested upwards of $300,000 into keeping District 1 blue. Donate today and help me show Nancy Pelosi what rural Arizona is made of! | | [DONATE $500, $100 OR $25 NOW!](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-buutdjk-jriylrtihd-y/)
---
Farmers, ranchers, and the most vulnerable among us, should not be used as political toys for partisan bickering. Good stewardship of our natural resources; encouraging work capable people to become producers; helping those who are truly in need; and a safe, reliable, and sustainable food supply is vital to the health, security, and prosperity of all.

Join me in the fight to bring real representation to rural Arizona!

Sincerely,
Tiffany Shedd

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f1077a4dc0bf61e1be18d3bf46789fe98cb572266c0adeb86f31f216299aa025cadcb4157ebda345501d755cd7eb5c305ab
Trump Donates First-Quarter 2018 Salary to VA

- Politico

President Donald J. Trump is donating his first-quarter salary for 2018 to the Department of Veterans Affairs, Eli Okun reports for Politico. The President has pledged to donate his salary to government agencies; most recently, he donated to the Department of Transportation.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f10cd26fabe320b35e43bb0bb6ceac4042f5c110b427332386fdd4a7c367f41f2acb165690458fdbe177301233353209b27

Gina Haspel Confirmed As New CIA Director

- The Associated Press

Gina Haspel has been confirmed as Director of the Central Intelligence Agency after a number of Democrats joined with Republicans in a Senate confirmation vote on Thursday. Haspel, who was supported by many in the CIA rank-and-file, will be the first female director in the Agency’s history.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f10f1770ff06e94f6c68bd5f6b404cc3c62eb1e64845ee91ced838eb6a3a1e6e9ab11d6b2d65bec9c0c6f122ccad331535a

U.S. Companies Seen Investing More in Business This Year After Tax Cuts

- Reuters

Because of President Trump’s massive reform of America’s tax code, more U.S. companies are investing in technology, equipment, and facilities this year. “First-quarter capital expenditures total $159 billion, up more than 21 percent from a year ago and on track to be the highest year-over-year growth since the third quarter of 2011, according to S&P Dow Jones Indices data,” Caroline Valetkevitch writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f10c01ad398f8f4684801828647f1ba82849a44af07eb8cfdd9c12f0f4871b6fe3a98cfbaacc035b929d9b84e34b723bff2

Melania Trump Feels 'Great,' Going Home 'Soon' from Hospital

- USA Today

First Lady Melania Trump tweeted on Wednesday a “sincere thank you to Walter Reed Medical Unit & to all who have send good wishes & prayers.” She added that she is feeling great and looks forward to returning to the White House after a successful embolization procedure this week.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f106a34c73b6264b2b43ad94e8dccc165004cbd9fee8cb654fc047bf49a0e57e5b365240f7d7fe8def2c0a9e276c96f1e42

Donald Trump: We Need Merit-Based Immigration to Fill Jobs in Growing Economy

- Breitbart

At a roundtable discussion on sanctuary cities this week, President Trump emphasized that “the United States was not opposed to immigration based on skills,” Charlie Spiering reports. “We want people to come into our country based on merit. We’re not looking to keep them out, we need to bring them in,” the President added.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f109e50798d13ffc9e7b97035a4c820f3eb724f7e010f9f87915ec5f25339c69bf584178e5f995fd08b1e3678d8bb3223e5

Trump: Countries Not Meeting NATO Obligations Will Be 'Dealt With'

- Reuters

The President reminded our NATO partners this week that members who do not contribute fully to the alliance will be “dealt with.” President Trump called on countries to “demonstrate leadership in the alliance by addressing its longstanding shortfall in defense contributions.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a885fe896262f10b3d37f9480d63bd9da67d965fafa54369941d0bc342228a1e97e0bc20d65e0d2797259d430bb62fd48eb36d2ba80031f

Mothers of the White House: Sarah Sanders, Kellyanne Conway, and Mercedes Schlapp

- The Daily Caller

Meet the working moms of the White House—Press Secretary Sarah Sanders, Counselor to the President Kellyanne Conway, and White House Director of Strategic Communications Mercedes Schlapp—who have a total of 12 children between them. They hold some of the most influential roles in our government while executing the duties that all working moms share.

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: We're doing things differently this year, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The DNC is no longer in the business of mapping out our strategy once every four years. We are organizing year-round, up and down the ballot, in all 50 states for one simple reason: it's the only way
---
Our party is doing things differently this year, Derek.

The DNC is no longer in the business of mapping out our strategy once every four years. We are organizing year-round, up and down the ballot, in all 50 states for one simple reason: it's the only way to win elections.

You don't need me to tell you that the stakes this year are incredibly high -- but if we invest right now in grassroots organizing, we will be unstoppable in November. The only way to truly stop the madness of the Trump administration is to elect a Democratic Congress, and the only way to elect a Democratic Congress is to support Democratic candidates nationwide, starting right now.

**Make a $3 contribution to help Democrats organize and win.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e47113b/3393948578/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abl-new-dnc?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e471138/3393948578/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abl-new-dnc?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e471139/3393948578/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abl-new-dnc?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c6/3393948578/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abl-new-dnc?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c7/3393948578/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abl-new-dnc?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c4/3393948578/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abl-new-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")
** This election cycle, the DNC has launched four programs that will help transform the way our party engages with voters and communities across the country. I'll share a bit more about them below, but you should keep one thing in mind before you keep reading: **these programs will only succeed if millions of Democrats come together to support them.**

**Every ZIP Code Counts** is our party's commitment to organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018, 2019 and beyond. The DNC is investing $10,000 in every state party in the country every month to help with this effort. By working at the local level, we will strengthen our state parties and ensure they have the resources to win elections.

**Winning with Partners in 2018** is a program launched by Deputy Chair Keith Ellison knowing that the DNC is one organization that is part of a broader movement committed to electing Democrats. Through a series of town hall meetings across the country, Keith is pulling together state party leaders, community activists, and organizations new and old. By listening to people on the ground, we can discover common goals and better mobilize our communities this year and in the years ahead.

**The IWillVote campaign** is an ambitious plan to reach 50 million voters by November. When more people vote, Democrats win! The four components of this program will be: 1) getting our community to commit to vote, 2) ensuring they are registered to vote, 3) providing voter education and protection, and 4) running a get-out-the-vote campaign.

**The Best Practices Institute** is an innovation and training hub to support candidates and state parties. We are investing in creative solutions while focusing on the proven best practices that will help develop a permanent infrastructure to continue our progress in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

Here's the thing, Derek. This is a road map for the DNC's strategy this year -- but our success won't come solely from these programs. It will come from people like you who speak up and seize your opportunity to have a say in which direction our country will take.

**[Contribute $3 right now if you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide who will get to work fighting for the values we share.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c5/3393948578/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abl-new-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Contribute+3+right+now+if+youre+ready+to&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd")**

Thank you for your continued support of the Democratic Party. As long as we keep working together, I am confident that we'll help Democrats win up and down the ballot while fighting for the progressive values that are the core of our party.

All my best,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c3/3393948578/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c0/3393948578/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fbd/4067b0a/59ce25f89/7e4710c1/3393948578/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180518_abl_nd&source=em_20180518_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180518_abl_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

A lot has happened this week, team:

Pennsylvanians went to the polls and re-affirmed their support for me during our primary election, support I'm truly honored to have.

President Trump recorded a robocall and sent a series of tweets about this race, doubling-down on his support for Congressman Barletta, who is now officially my opponent in this Senate race.

And the general election kicked off in earnest. That means that we'll finish hiring campaign staff, stock field offices and travel across the state to meet with voters. It also means that we need to seriously increase our monthly campaign budget.

**_[Can you make a $5 donation today to help kick off the general election?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67e0/51dbcc2a/7b379c/3a2b2f1/488605032/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUxOV9mcjFfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180519_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

This race will only get tougher. The GOP is already coming after me, and I expect that they'll double-down now that the general election is in full swing. After winning statewide in 2016, Republicans want nothing more than to see PA go red again in 2018 -- we need to do everything we can to make sure that doesn't happen.

That's why making a $5 investment in Pennsylvania has never been more important. This campaign needs to be ready fight back against Republican attacks and to spread our message to every corner of the Commonwealth, and we can't do it without your help.

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67e0/51dbcc2a/7b379c/3a2b2f1/488605032/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUxOV9mcjFfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180519_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

name: Team Kaine HQ
subject: Make your voice heard and sign this petition. Show Senator Kaine you support holding the Commander in Chief and his hawkish advisors accountable to people other than just themselves. Your signature matters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f133d/3e0906/66031f57/3e34f34b/1611135527/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180519_1_PET_TEAM_War-Powers-RS&source=20180519_1_PET_TEAM_War-Powers-RS")

| | Derek -

Last month, Mike Pompeo became Secretary of State. Joining newly-minted national security advisor John Bolton, both appointees are likely to push for military solutions over diplomacy and round out President Trump's new, and dangerous, war cabinet.

President Trump has already launched missile strikes against Syria without permission from Congress. And given past comments from Bolton and Pompeo as well as President Trump's erratic behavior, many Americans are left worried that he'll attack Iran or North Korea next.

So how do we pump the brakes? How do we make sure our president doesn't lead us into an unnecessary war?

It's something Tim has been working on for years: **congressional authorization of military force.**

The Constitution gives Congress - not the President - the authority to declare war. That means the President must come to Congress when deploying U.S. troops to new countries across the globe or making a decision on whether to strike another nation. Yet if we don't act now, President Trump will continue operating as if he can use military force whenever and wherever, completely unchecked.

Tim Kaine has worked across the aisle with Senator Corker to negotiate and introduce a new military authorization to accomplish these goals.

[Sign this petition if you agree the Trump Administration needs to come to Congress before committing American soldiers to fight more wars.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f133d/3e0906/66031f57/3e34f34a/1611135527/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Congressional-Authorization-Petition?source=20180519_1_PET_TEAM_War-Powers-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sign+this+petition+if+you+agree+the+Trum&utm_campaign=20180519_1_PET_TEAM_War-Powers-RS")

**Pushing for measures that reinstate congressional approval could make a HUGE difference in the coming month.**

Tim supported stronger congressional authority even before President Trump was in the Oval Office, but now he knows it is more important than ever that Congress has the ability to check the executive branch when it comes to waging war.

He will continue to fight for measures that limit the president's ability to use military force in place of diplomacy, but he can only be successful if we all continue to speak out against abuses of power.

[Make your voice heard and sign this petition. Show Senator Kaine you support holding the Commander in Chief and his hawkish advisors accountable to people other than just themselves.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f133d/3e0906/66031f57/3e34f349/1611135527/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Congressional-Authorization-Petition?source=20180519_1_PET_TEAM_War-Powers-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Make+your+voice+heard+and+sign+this+peti&utm_campaign=20180519_1_PET_TEAM_War-Powers-RS")

We need to send a message to the White House: you cannot wage any war, anywhere, any time, just because you want to. The American people and their representatives have a right to know what is going on.

As the conversation continues, Tim will continue to push hard to raise our voices and safeguard our future.

Thanks,

subject: Major Win for the Pro-Life Movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=97A118A9A3654)

| | Friends,

I wanted to make sure you saw [the news](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=97A118A9A3656) that the Trump Administration has announced they will propose a "Protect Life" rule to prevent Title X federal "family planning" dollars from being steered to abortion providers like Planned Parenthood.

This "family planning" loophole has allowed Planned Parenthood to receive millions of taxpayer dollars over the years, and it must be stopped. Let me be clear: Abortion is **_not_** family planning.
I recently [signed on to a letter to the Secretary of Health and Human Services](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=97A118A9A3657) requesting that the Department make changes to the Title X program for this very reason. I am pleased that the Administration is putting an end to this harmful loophole that allows Planned Parenthood to get away with performing abortions on taxpayers' dime.
You may have seen my recent assurances that Congress provided no money for abortion in the recent government funding package. That remains true, and this action by the President further ensures that Planned Parenthood isn’t able to receive these dollars through Title X grants.
I have always believed that life begins at conception, and I will never stop fighting for life at all stages.
\- Martha

name: Jeffrey Carson, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Bring them home - Armed Forces Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, You may not know this about me, but before I became involved in politics and the Austin Petersen campaign, I served in the U.S. Army. I even achieved the rank of Captain and completed a tour in Iraq. My time in the Army taught me a great deal about leadership, strategy, and our foreign policy. I believe my military service has given me a unique perspective as a campaign manager and benefits the campaign a great deal. I love my country. I swore an oath to protect and defend our Constitution against all enemies, both foreign and domestic. Which is why I continue to serve by working my butt off to elect Austin Petersen to the U.S. Senate. Today is Armed Forces day. I believe Austin Petersen is the candidate that will most honor our servicemen and women by promoting an America-First foreign policy. President Trump should trust his instincts here. It’s time to bring our troops home. [**If you agree, please add your name to this petition by clicking here >>>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/bring_our_troops_home?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=051918_troops&n=1) Austin believes we should only get involved in military conflicts that DIRECTLY threaten our national security. Searching for monsters overseas to destroy is not the foreign policy that our Founding Fathers envisioned. No more nation-building! No more regime change wars - especially without congressional approval. Our servicemen and women are not meant to be policemen of the world, but protectors of our borders, our people, and our freedom. This is why I am so proud and grateful to be running Austin’s campaign. Bringing our troops home is an issue that means a great deal to me personally. Please add your name if you agree: [**https://www.austinpetersen.com/bring_our_troops_home**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/bring_our_troops_home?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=051918_troops&n=2) Thanks so much, Friend! Jeffrey Carson
Campaign Manager
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
What just happened: | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48bd4/c1f7015/68bf4e38/11437cb8/2239677192/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-planned-parenthood-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&refcode=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&utm_campaign=pp-update&utm_medium=ema") Friend, The day we'd been worried about is finally here: The Trump administration just announced its plan to defund Planned Parenthood -- using executive authority. [**It's why we need to make sure we elect Tina to fight back against attacks like this: Donate $10 or more right now.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48bd4/c1f7015/68bf4e38/11437cb8/2239677192/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-planned-parenthood-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&refcode=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&utm_campaign=pp-update&utm_medium=ema") Trump's latest move is designed to undermine Title X. For nearly two decades, Title X law has been clear: Health care providers cannot withhold information from you about your pregnancy options. Trump's new rule changes all of that -- and if that scares you, it should. These changes to Title X are intended to make it impossible for patients to get birth control or preventive care from reproductive health care providers like Planned Parenthood. Millions of Americans depend on providers like Planned Parenthood for their health care and family planning, and this impacts folks who need help the most. Attacking the basic health care that millions of people rely on is wrong and dangerous, and it's par for the course from this administration and its right-wing agenda. The best way to fight back? Elect senators like Tina: As the first senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood, she knows firsthand how important Planned Parenthood health care services are. And she will do everything she can to fight for women. [**Donate $10 or more to stand with Tina and Planned Parenthood today.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48bd4/c1f7015/68bf4e38/11437cb8/2239677192/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-planned-parenthood-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&refcode=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&utm_campaign=pp-update&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Team Smith | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc48bd4/c1f7015/68bf4e38/11437cb8/2239677192/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-planned-parenthood-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&refcode=ema_2018-05-18_pp-update&utm_campaign=pp-update&utm_medium=ema")

subject: exciting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Team-- Our huge primary win showed the power of this grassroots campaign -- **and national news organizations are taking notice.** CNN featured our race this week as one of the most exciting and energized campaigns in country. Here's the drawback: **Rep. Ted Budd and his Washington special interest friends see these stories, too.** Ted Budd's allies know he's in trouble. And if the polling and the big numbers we put up on primary day hasn't spooked them already, this new attention will definitely spur them to spend money and try to save Ted Budd's job. [**_The only way to fight back is with your help. We need to raise another $25,000 this month to keep the momentum and get ready for a special interest tidal wave of spending. Will you rush in a contribution?_**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427853/e3b7d3/5ccfefd6/2555b1f3/4042966299/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180519#") I got into this race for a lot of reasons: To protect access to affordable healthcare; to improve the lives of people in this district; to make sure our communities are well-represented. I'm constantly blown away by the energy and enthusiasm I see from the people I meet in this district. So many of you tell me about your struggles and challenges. So many are frustrated with Rep. Budd and the constant dysfunction in Washington. So many of you are ready for a change. Together, we're making that change possible. Special interests underestimated us at first. But after our big primary win, the massive ground game we are building, and this new round of national media coverage, they won't anymore. The special interest money is coming. The attacks are coming. We have to be ready to stand up to them. [**_Let's make sure we keep up our success by hitting this $25,000 goal. Quick update from Casey campaign HQ for you, team:
1. _On Tuesday, Democrats once again chose Bob Casey as our nominee for U.S. Senate_ with Democratic turnout about 60,000 votes higher than the Republicans'.

2. _That evening, Barletta told a local news outlet that "there is going to be a flood of outside money in this race,"_ so we know pushing back is going to get expensive _fast_.

3. _President Trump tweeted his support for Barletta and attacks against Bob throughout the day Wednesday_ , indicating once again that he's going to be a fixture of this race.

**We crunched the numbers in our staff meeting this week, and we need to raise another $5,400 today if we want the first week of the general election to be successful. We need to stock field offices, hire more staffers and boost our advertising budget, and that all adds up.**

**_[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to stand up to Donald Trump's candidate for U.S. Senate?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67e4/51dbcc2a/687a08/3a2b388/716501696/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUxOV9mcjJfbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180519_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

And now that Trump's hand-picked candidate is officially the Republican nominee, we need to be prepared for their wealthy allies to pour money into the Commonwealth.

**It won 't be easy, but if we win in Pennsylvania this year, it will be a huge blow to Donald Trump. Show him where you stand: donate $5 to help meet our goal today.**

subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Team,

I know it's the weekend, but I have to reach out about something important.

My friend Garrett VeneKlasen is running for New Mexico Land Commissioner, and he needs your support before the June 5th primary that is coming up.

**With less than three weeks to go, Garrett is racing to raise $3,000 before midnight tonight so he can continue knocking on doors, talking to voters, and getting out the vote.

[Garrett will be a champion for our public lands if elected, and that is why I'm asking for your help today. Can you contribute to Garrett's campaign so we can keep building Garrett's momentum before the primary?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gvkheinrichprimary&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Garrett+will+be+a+champion+for+our+publi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_NM_180519_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_NM_180519_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_NM_180519_1_1")**

You don't just have to take my word for it. Garrett has been endorsed by the local Sierra Club, New Mexico Conservation Voters Action Fund, the National Wildlife Federation Action Fund, Albuquerque Our Revolution and Roswell Indivisible. That's a pretty great list of folks who support Garrett.

Garrett has been on the campaign trail for a year. He's taking on President Trump, he's calling out the frackers and polluters and he's got real plans to transform New Mexico's public lands.

**[But he needs to hit his fundraising goal so his momentum can keep building. Please donate before midnight so Garrett has what he needs in the final stretch before the primary->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gvkheinrichprimary&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+But+he+needs+to+hit+his+fundraising+goal&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_NM_180519_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_NM_180519_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_NM_180519_1_1")**

Thanks for all you do to support Democrats, and I hope you have a great rest to your weekend!

\-- Martin
